subtitulo: Game-context translator using local AI + official terminology
panel_entrada_descripcion: Paste lines from ESP Translate here
panel_entrada_placeholder:
Paste lines to translate here...

Example:
Whiterun is a city in the hold of Whiterun.
The Stormcloaks are fighting the Imperial Legion.
panel_salida_descripcion: Copy this text and paste it into ESP Translate
slider_terminos_tooltip: Controls how many Skyrim terms are searched in the database to give context to the AI. More terms = better accuracy on names, but slower translation. Recommended: 30 for normal text, 50 for text with many proper names.
slider_lineas_tooltip: Long text is split into fragments of this size. Fewer lines = better quality (the model follows the glossary), but slower. More lines = faster, but may lose terminology. Recommended: 8 for precision, 15 for speed.
footer_flujo: Flow: ESP Translate → Copy → Paste here → Translate → Copy result → Paste in ESP Translate
footer_motor: Engine: Ollama + ChromaDB + RAG | Model: {model} | Prompts: {count}
prompts_seccion_descripcion: **Manage your translation prompts.** Create custom prompts for different text types (dialogues, books, specific characters, etc.). Prompts are automatically saved in `servidor_config/prompts/saved_prompts.json`.
prompts_desc_placeholder: E.g: Special translation for Argonian character dialogues
prompts_contenido_placeholder: Write the instructions the AI will receive here...
prompt_nombre_vacio: Write a name for the prompt
prompt_nuevo_msg: Write the name, description and content of the new prompt
